building.theme: Generic urban / modular buildings (brick, doorways, barricades)

factory.theme: Industrial factory: pipes, tanks, conveyors, machinery, catwalks

dungeon.theme: Modular stone dungeon: corridors, rooms, stairs, gates, props

prototype.theme: Greybox primitives + placeholder animals/items for blockout

space_kit.theme: Original Kenney space kit: rockets, rovers, astronauts, terrain (embedded)

space_station.theme: Sleek space-station interior: corridors, windows, balconies, props

castle.theme: Medieval castle: walls, towers, battlements, gates, stairs, banners

city_industrial.theme: Industrial city exterior: concrete buildings, chimneys, tanks, ground slabs

graveyard.theme: Graveyard: fences, grave mounds, headstones, mausoleum/crypt, dead trees

platformer.theme: Platformer: platforms, slopes/ramps, blocks, hazards, coins

retro_urban.theme: Retro urban / cyberpunk city: roads, buildings, signage (multi-texture: asphalt/concrete/bars/dirt)

dev_essentials.theme: Prototype/dev textures: checkerboard, gradient, noise, UV, normal

road_tiles.theme: Road / track tiles (OBJ only - needs OBJ->GLB conversion for Bevy)
